title: Invigorating Air Fried Croatian Petit Pois Skillet
description: This keto-friendly dish features air-fried petit pois and is served in a slate-tile vessel, providing a cultured and crumbly energizing Croatian meal. It combines the freshness of petit pois with the crunch of air-fried elements.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together petit pois, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Load the petit pois mixture into the air fryer basket and cook for 5 minutes, shaking halfway through.
While the petit pois are cooking, prepare the slate-tile vessel by sprinkling crumbly feta cheese at the bottom.
Once the petit pois are done, remove them from the air fryer and place them on top of the feta cheese in the slate-tile vessel.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the petit pois and drizzle with lemon juice.
Serve the Invigorating Air Fried Croatian Petit Pois Skillet hot, directly from the slate-tile vessel.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
